---
mode: ask
description: Evaluate a lab spec from a zero-knowledge learner's perspective
---

[agents/learner-experience-evaluator.md](../../agents/learner-experience-evaluator.md)

Evaluate the attached lab spec from a zero-knowledge learner's perspective using the agent definition above. This assesses completion likelihood, concept clarity, pacing, and failure recovery.

Attach the spec file from `labs/specs/` using #file before sending.
Output saves to `labs/reports/{name}/{name}-learner-exp-eval-v{N}.md`.
